value:
v1.12.2 shipped 2026-04-16; v1.12.x integrity chain (#76-#80, #87) DONE.

v1.13.0 PLANNING kicked off 2026-04-22 via real-usage dataset analysis (see reference.codexcli_usage_dataset in global store — 584-call, 15-day MCP export). Milestone now has 12 open issues.

NEW THIS CYCLE from that analysis (all v1.13.0):
- #91 formalize cross-session handoff protocol — context.next_session emerged as the most-written key (20 writes across 6 sessions). Biggest conceptual change; design-first before coding.
- #92 audit MCP tool descriptions for agent tool-selection clarity — 48% of codex_get calls pass empty key (agents browsing with the wrong tool). Docs-only, low-risk.
- #93 audit log data quality gaps — op="write" for removes (39 conflated), aliasResolved inconsistently captured, bootstrap-rate metric mislabels MCP-only as total. Plumbing.
- Calibration data on #82 (seed-quality lint) and #83 (topology) — Layer 2 tools now buildable with real-world churn/co-occurrence input.

Also still in v1.13.0 milestone from earlier cycles: #88 askPassword non-interactive, #89 shape-invalid import bypass, #90 hardcoded 'ccli' hint, #84 entry health, #45 attribution, #47 diff, #50 npx, #86 CI bump.

DOGFOODING: docs/dogfooding-real-usage.md committed 2026-04-22 as Part Two — freeze-fix validation, cascadeDelete inoculation story, emergent handoff pattern. Publishable alongside v1.13.0 tag.

NEXT: trim milestone (12 issues is sizeable; agent-first #91/#92/#93 is the cleanest narrative). Design-first on #91. #92 + #93 ship as independent commits anytime.
